pattern: The three named conditions are mutually exclusive ranges of the timer value, so a direct chain of comparisons in the right order picks out the matching signal or falls through to invalid.
hints: Check for the exact value zero first, since that is a single specific case rather than a range.
Check for the exact value thirty next, since it too is a single specific case rically distinct from the surrounding range.
Anything strictly between thirty and ninety inclusive on the upper end is red; anything that matches none of the three conditions is invalid.

edge_inputs.description: a value inside the red range
a value that matches no condition
the value just below the red range boundary is invalid, not red
the value at the very top of the red range
the largest allowed timer value, well past every named condition

stress.description: every possible timer value across the full bound
